source.title: Overweight and obesity management
source.population: Adults, children, and young people with overweight, obesity, or central adiposity, subject to section-specific age criteria.
source.setting: Identification, sensitive discussion, assessment, behavioural intervention, referral, and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected permission-sensitive adult weight discussion, measurements, context, previous attempts, goals, clinician-discussed intervention or referral, and follow-up fields. It does not support automatic advice, medicine selection, dosing, or UAE referral pathways.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.9.1–1.9.17 — permission, measurements, and adult assessment

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports avoiding diagnostic overshadowing, asking permission before weight discussion or measurements, and recording height, weight, BMI, waist or waist-to-height context and weight-related health risk.
